<?php namespace MailerSend\Helpers; class Url { protected array $options; public function __construct(array $options) { $this->options = $options; } public function execute(string $path, array $params = []): string { $paramsString = http_build_query($params); return $this->options['protocol'].'://'. $this->options['host']. '/'.$this->options['api_path']. '/'.$path. ($paramsString ? '?'.$paramsString : ''); } }
